title: PrimeBattles
description: This Modpack Is Good For Playing SMP and PvPing
body:
📌 Overview

This modpack combines the best of SMP survival and PvP combat, offering a balanced experience for players who enjoy building, exploring, and fighting. It enhances the vanilla feel while keeping performance smooth and stable for both solo and server play.

⚔️ PvP Features

Improved combat responsiveness

Cleaner visuals and better hit feedback

Optimized movement and attack timing

Perfect for duels, clan fights, and open-world PvP

These enhancements keep PvP competitive without adding unnecessary complexity.

🌍 SMP Features

Quality-of-life building tools

Better exploration and progression

Lightweight survival improvements

Balanced gameplay for long-term worlds

Everything is tuned to support fun, community-driven SMP play.

🚀 Performance & Stability

FPS optimizations for low-end and high-end PCs

Faster chunk loading

Reduced server and client lag

Stable performance for large servers

Your world stays smooth, even with many players online.

🤝 Perfect For Servers

This modpack is ideal for SMPs, factions, PvP arenas, teams, or groups of friends wanting a simple but polished experience. It keeps gameplay competitive, stable, and fun from start to finish.
